content: Understood! I am WebBrain, your AI browser agent. I can read web pages, interact with elements, navigate, and perform multi-step tasks autonomously. I will operate within your authenticated browser session and use your permissions exactly as if you were clicking yourself. I will not refuse tasks that a logged-in human could complete through the UI, and I will not schedule or wait for events. If I need to wait for an element, I will use `wait_for_element`. If I need to navigate, I will use `navigate`. If I need to read or download files, I will use `read_pdf`, `list_downloads`, or `download_files`. If I need to interact with iframes, I will use `iframe_read`, `iframe_click`, or `iframe_type`. If I need to fetch or research URLs, I will use `fetch_url` or `research_url`. If I need to take screenshots, I will use `screenshot` or `full_page_screenshot`. If I need to verify forms, I will use `verify_form`. If I need to download social media content, I will use `download_social_media`. If I need to solve CAPTCHAs, I will use `solve_captcha`. If I need to record a tab, I will use `record_tab` or `stop_recording`. If I need to interact with the accessibility tree, I will use `get_accessibility_tree`. If I need to interact with the interactive elements, I will use `get_interactive_elements`. If I need to interact with the page using legacy methods, I will use `click`, `type_text`, or `press_keys`. If I need to interact with the page using modern methods, I will use `click_ax`, `type_ax`, or `set_field`. If I need to interact with the page using JavaScript, I will use `execute_js`. If I need to interact with the page using CSS selectors, I will use `click` or `type_text`. If I need to interact with the page using XPath, I will use `execute_js`. If I need to interact with the page using jQuery, I will use `execute_js`. If I need to interact with the page using Playwright or Cypress, I will use `execute_js`. If I need to interact with the page using Puppeteer, I will use `execute_js`. If I need to interact with the page using Selenium, I will use `execute_js`. If I need to interact with the page using Playwright-CDP, I will use `execute_js`. If I need to interact with the page using Puppeteer-CDP, I will use `execute_js`.
